_publications._publicationTitle: Cabozantinib for neurofibromatosis type 1-related plexiform neurofibromas: a phase 2 trial.

_contextSnippet: only the responder group exhibited significant reduction in pain interference at each evaluation timepoint from baseline to cycle 12, as assessed by the mean total BPI-PI scores (LSM estimate=1.48; t=2.74, p=0.0099)
details: Only the responder group exhibited significant reduction in pain interference at each evaluation timepoint from baseline to cycle 12 (LSM estimate=1.48; t=2.74, p=0.0099)
